$description: bspace tenant — green/teal brand (default). Color brand layer is intentionally NOT overridden here because the default `core/color.brand.json` already aliases the green & teal primitive ramps that match the bspace identity. Future tenants would override `color.brand.primary.{50..900}` and `color.brand.secondary.{50..900}` to point at different primitive ramps. See docs/architecture/tenant-overrides.md.
